Your dog doesn't remember that you snapped at it yesterday,
and it doesn't worry about whether it'll be left behind tomorrow.

It lives only in now —
now you're home,
now there's sunlight,
now you're willing to walk this stretch of road with it.

We spend so much money on classes and books
trying to learn how to 'live in the present.'

Meanwhile the one at home
has been demonstrating it with its whole life.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend stuck between yesterday's regrets and tomorrow's anxieties
variations: Short version: your dog doesn't spiral, because it spends all its energy loving the version of you that exists right now.
Bonus: it doesn't ask what you did wrong in the past or what you can give it in the future. It only cares whether you're here, this moment.

items.sourceNote: 狗主人睡覺被狗佔床的幽默，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
床是我買的，
床單是我洗的，
房租是我付的。

但每天晚上，
我都用很彆扭的姿勢睡在床角，
只為了不要吵醒那隻睡成大字型的狗。

名義上這是我的床，
實際上我只是租了一個小角落。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天被狗逼到床邊、卻一句怨言都捨不得說的朋友
variations: 精簡版：我不是床的主人，我是床的房客，房東是一隻狗。
延伸版：我曾經以為買大床能解決問題，結果牠只是睡得更開了。

en.content:
I bought the bed.
I wash the sheets.
I pay the rent.

And yet every single night
I sleep curled up in one awkward corner,
just so I don't wake the dog sprawled out like a starfish.

On paper, it's my bed.
In practice, I'm renting a tiny corner of it.
en.editorNote: Send to any friend who gets pushed to the edge of their own bed every night and never complains
variations: Short version: I'm not the owner of the bed. I'm a tenant. My landlord is a dog.
Bonus: I thought a bigger bed would fix this. It just gave the dog more room to stretch.

items.sourceNote: 狗毛沾滿衣服的日常，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
出門前，我會照鏡子。

不是看頭髮亂不亂，
是看身上沾了多少狗毛。

後來我放棄了。

現在我把狗毛當成一種風格——
一種「家裡有人愛我」的標誌。
別人穿名牌，我穿一身柴犬。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天黏一身狗毛、卻甘之如飴的養狗朋友
variations: 精簡版：我衣服上的狗毛不是髒，是我家有狗的證明。
延伸版：滾筒黏毛器是我家的耗材，跟衛生紙一樣，永遠用不夠。

en.content:
Before I leave the house, I check the mirror.

Not for my hair —
for how much dog fur is on me.

Eventually I gave up.

Now I treat the fur as a style —
a badge that says someone at home loves me.
Others wear designer labels. I wear a full coat of golden retriever.
en.editorNote: Send to any dog owner who's permanently covered in fur and wouldn't have it any other way
variations: Short version: the fur on my shirt isn't a mess. It's proof there's a dog at home.
Bonus: lint rollers are a household staple here, right next to the toilet paper, and somehow we always run out.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗是你世界的一部分、你卻是牠全世界，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
對你來說，
狗狗只是生活的一部分——
工作、朋友、手機之外的一小塊。

但對牠來說，
你不是一部分，
你是全部。

你是牠的早晨、牠的午後、
牠等了一整天的那個聲音。

所以下班回家，請先抱抱牠。
你只是晚了幾小時，
牠卻已經想你一整天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給總覺得「狗在家很乖、不用太擔心」的朋友
variations: 精簡版：你有一百件事，牠只有你一件事。
延伸版：牠不會怪你回來晚，牠只會把所有的開心，都壓縮在你開門那三秒鐘。

en.content:
To you,
a dog is just one part of life —
a small slice next to work, friends, and your phone.

But to your dog,
you aren't a part.
You're the whole thing.

You're its morning, its afternoon,
the sound it waited all day to hear.

So when you get home, hug it first.
You were only a few hours late.
It's been missing you the entire day.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone who figures the dog is fine home alone and doesn't need much worrying about
variations: Short version: you have a hundred things. Your dog has exactly one — you.
Bonus: it won't hold the late hours against you. It just compresses a whole day of joy into the three seconds you open the door.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗一生陪伴的時間哲學，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
你會經歷很多階段——
換工作、搬家、認識新的人、又跟一些人說再見。

而牠，
從你把牠抱回家那天起，
就決定把整個狗生，
都花在等你回家這件小事上。

你的人生有很多章節，
牠卻只想當你每一頁的背景。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給陪你走過好幾年的老狗的主人，他會紅了眼眶
variations: 精簡版：你是牠的一輩子，牠卻只是你人生的一段。所以請把那一段，過得溫柔一點。
延伸版：牠不需要你給牠全世界，牠只需要你願意，在每個普通的傍晚，準時回家。

en.content:
You'll go through a lot of chapters —
new jobs, new homes, new people, and goodbyes to some old ones.

And your dog,
from the day you carried it home,
decided to spend its entire life
on one small thing: waiting for you to come back.

Your life has many chapters.
It only ever wanted to be the background of every page.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone whose old dog has walked beside them for years — it'll get them right in the chest
variations: Short version: you're its whole life. It's only one stretch of yours. So make that stretch a gentle one.
Bonus: it doesn't need you to give it the world. It just needs you to come home on time, on the most ordinary of evenings.

items.sourceNote: 狗主人讓出床位的幽默語錄，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
這張床，法律上是我的。

但實際上，我只是租了角落那一小塊，
而且還要側著睡、縮著腿、半夜不能翻身，
只因為某隻狗已經把自己攤成一個「大」字。

房東是我，租客是牠。
但每天晚上，誰才是真正的主人，大家心裡都很清楚。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種寧可自己睡到落枕、也不忍心叫狗讓位的朋友，他會邊笑邊點頭
variations: 精簡版：床是我買的，但每天晚上我只能睡邊邊。所有權跟使用權，從來就是兩回事。
延伸版：我不是在跟狗搶床，我是在牠的床上，被恩准睡一晚。

en.content:
Legally, this bed is mine.

In practice, I rent one small corner of it —
sleeping on my side, knees tucked, not daring to roll over at 3 a.m.,
all because a certain dog has stretched itself into a perfect starfish.

I'm the landlord. The dog is the tenant.
But every night, we both know exactly who's in charge.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who'd rather wake up with a stiff neck than disturb a sleeping dog — they'll laugh and nod
variations: Short version: I bought the bed, but I only get the edge. Ownership and usage rights were never the same thing.
Bonus: I'm not fighting the dog for the bed. I'm being graciously permitted to sleep one night in its bed.

items.sourceNote: 狗把頭放在主人腿上就走不了的幽默語錄，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
「不好意思，今天我可能去不了了。」

為什麼？

因為我家狗剛剛把頭，輕輕放在我的腿上。

你不懂——這個動作在我們家，
等同於正式且具有法律效力的合約。
一旦簽署，當事人不得任意離開沙發。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合當作臨時取消約會的「正當理由」傳給朋友，他懂的話會直接原諒你
variations: 精簡版：我本來要出門的，但狗把頭放上來了。這在我家就是不可抗力。
延伸版：別人放鴿子是沒禮貌，我放鴿子是因為腿上壓著一條無法移動的狗。

en.content:
"Sorry, I don't think I can make it today."

Why?

Because my dog just gently rested its head on my lap.

You don't understand — in this house,
that gesture is a formal, legally binding contract.
Once signed, the party in question may not leave the couch.
en.editorNote: Perfect to send when you're bailing on plans — any dog person will instantly forgive you
variations: Short version: I was about to head out, but the dog put its head down. That's force majeure in this house.
Bonus: when other people flake, it's rude. When I flake, it's because there's an immovable dog pinning my legs.

items.sourceNote: 狗不喜歡的人主人也不喜歡的幽默語錄，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我家狗對人的判斷，比我準。

牠不會看你的職稱，不會看你的車，
也不在乎你說話多好聽。

牠只是聞一聞、看一眼，
然後決定要不要把肚子翻給你。

所以說真的——
如果牠不喜歡你，那我大概，
也不會太喜歡你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給同樣「相信狗的直覺勝過自己」的養狗朋友，他會深表認同
variations: 精簡版：我家狗的人品雷達比我靈。牠對你皺眉，我就會多留一個心眼。
延伸版：牠願意在你面前睡到打呼，代表你通過了我家最高等級的安檢。

en.content:
My dog reads people better than I do.

It doesn't check your job title, doesn't look at your car,
doesn't care how smooth your words are.

It just sniffs once, glances once,
and decides whether to roll over and show you its belly.

So honestly —
if my dog doesn't like you,
chances are I won't either.
en.editorNote: Send to the dog friend who also trusts their dog's read on people more than their own — instant agreement
variations: Short version: my dog's character radar beats mine. If it side-eyes you, I'm keeping one eye open too.
Bonus: if it falls asleep snoring in front of you, congratulations — you passed this household's highest security clearance.

items.sourceNote: 狗教會主人無條件的愛，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
牠不知道你今天搞砸了報告，
不知道你被已讀不回，
不知道你站在電梯裡偷偷哭過。

牠只知道，你回來了。

然後用全世界最簡單的方式告訴你：
不管你在外面是什麼樣子，
在這個家，你永遠是值得被開心迎接的那個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近過得有點累的人，讓他想起家裡那個永遠站在門口等他的小傢伙
variations: 精簡版：外面的世界會打分數，牠不會。在牠眼裡，你回家就是滿分。
延伸版：人會因為你的表現決定要不要愛你，狗只因為你是你，就愛得理所當然。

en.content:
It doesn't know you bombed the presentation today,
doesn't know you got left on read,
doesn't know you cried quietly in the elevator.

It only knows one thing: you're home.

And in the simplest way in the world, it tells you:
no matter who you are out there,
in this house you'll always be someone worth greeting with joy.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who's had a rough stretch — remind them of the little one always waiting by the door
variations: Short version: the world out there keeps score. Your dog doesn't. To it, coming home is a perfect ten.
Bonus: people decide whether to love you based on how you perform. A dog loves you simply because you're you.

items.sourceNote: 狗讓人生變得完整的語錄，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不是你人生的全部，
但牠會讓你的人生，變得完整。

牠補上的，不是你缺的那一塊，
而是你本來以為，不需要的那一塊——

直到牠搖著尾巴跑向你，
你才發現，原來這就是你一直在等的東西。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合配上一張狗狗奔向鏡頭的照片發限動，文案直接幫你寫好了
variations: 精簡版：牠不是我生活的全部，但少了牠，我的生活就少了一塊。
延伸版：有些幸福，是你養了狗之後才學會辨認的。

en.content:
A dog isn't your whole life,
but it makes your life whole.

What it fills in isn't the piece you knew was missing —
it's the piece you thought you didn't need,

until it came running toward you, tail going,
and you realized this was the thing you'd been waiting for all along.
en.editorNote: Perfect caption for a story post of your dog bolting toward the camera — the words are written for you
variations: Short version: it's not my whole life, but without it, my life would be missing a piece.
Bonus: some kinds of happiness you only learn to recognize after you get a dog.

items.sourceNote: 養狗才懂的日常——上廁所被監視，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
養狗之後我才知道，
原來「自己一個人上廁所」是一種奢侈。

我關門，牠用鼻子把門頂開。
我說等我一下，牠坐在我腳邊抬頭看我。

那眼神好像在問：
你還好嗎？需要我陪嗎？這裡危險嗎？

我只是要尿尿，但謝謝你的關心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「連上廁所都有狗跟進來」的朋友，他會笑著回你一張現場照
variations: 精簡版：養狗前最後一次自己上廁所是什麼時候，我已經不記得了。
延伸版：洗澡時門縫底下那兩隻爪子，是我這輩子收過最執著的等待。

en.content:
Since getting a dog, I've learned that
using the bathroom alone is a luxury.

I close the door, it nudges it open with its nose.
I say give me a minute, it sits by my feet and stares up at me.

The look says:
are you okay in there? Do you need company? Is it dangerous?

I'm just peeing, but thanks for caring.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend whose dog follows them into every room — you'll get a photo of the culprit back
variations: Short version: I genuinely can't remember the last time I used the bathroom by myself.
Bonus: those two paws under the door while you shower are the most devoted waiting you'll ever witness.

items.sourceNote: 把生活都規劃在狗身上的養狗族，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
別人出門前確認：手機、錢包、鑰匙。

我出門前確認：
狗的水夠不夠、窗簾要不要拉、垃圾桶有沒有蓋好、
沙發上的遙控器有沒有收起來、
還有最重要的——牠是不是又在用那種眼神看我。

結果我手機忘了帶，但狗的一切都安排得明明白白。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合配上一張「出門前最後一眼回頭看狗」的照片發限動
variations: 精簡版：我可以忘記帶錢包，但絕對不會忘記幫狗把水加滿。
延伸版：朋友揪我臨時出遊，我第一個想到的不是我有沒有空，是狗誰顧。

en.content:
Before leaving, most people check: phone, wallet, keys.

Before leaving, I check:
is the water bowl full, should I close the blinds, is the trash lid on,
did I move the remote off the couch,
and most importantly — is it giving me that look again.

Result: I forgot my phone, but the dog's entire world is perfectly arranged.
en.editorNote: Pairs perfectly with a story post of that last over-the-shoulder glance at your dog on the way out
variations: Short version: I can forget my wallet, but I will never forget to top off the water bowl.
Bonus: when a friend suggests a spontaneous trip, my first thought isn't whether I'm free — it's who watches the dog.

items.sourceNote: 狗不在意你的身分地位，只要真心，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不在乎你有沒有錢，
不在乎你今天穿得體不體面，
不在乎你的頭銜、你的學歷、你的存款數字。

牠只在乎一件事：
你願不願意把心交給牠。

你給牠你的心，牠就把整個自己，都給你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合分享給最近覺得自己被世界用各種標準衡量、有點累的朋友
variations: 精簡版：你給牠真心，牠就給你全部，從不討價還價。
延伸版：在狗面前你不用是誰，你只要是牠的人，就已經夠了。

en.content:
A dog doesn't care whether you have money,
doesn't care whether you're dressed sharp today,
doesn't care about your title, your degree, the number in your account.

It cares about one thing:
whether you'll hand it your heart.

Give it your heart, and it gives you all of itself.
en.editorNote: Share with a friend who's worn out from being measured by the world's endless standards
variations: Short version: give a dog your heart and it gives you everything, no haggling.
Bonus: in front of a dog you don't have to be anyone — being its person is already enough.

items.sourceNote: 狗的記憶與原諒——你罵牠三秒後又愛你，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
你兇牠的時候，牠耳朵塌下來，眼神超委屈，
好像全世界都背叛了牠。

結果三秒後，
牠又叼著球跑過來，尾巴搖得像沒事一樣。

狗最厲害的不是記得，
是牠選擇不記得——
因為比起生你的氣，牠更想趕快繼續愛你。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「氣場兩分鐘就被狗融化」的鏟屎官，他完全懂
variations: 精簡版：狗不是不會難過，是牠覺得愛你比較重要。
延伸版：人會記仇好幾年，狗連三秒都嫌久。這大概就是牠比我們快樂的原因。

en.content:
When you scold it, its ears drop and its eyes go full betrayed,
like the whole world just let it down.

Then three seconds later,
it trots back with a ball, tail wagging like nothing happened.

A dog's real talent isn't remembering —
it's choosing not to,
because it would rather get back to loving you than stay mad.
en.editorNote: Send to the dog parent whose stern face melts in two minutes flat — they know exactly this
variations: Short version: it's not that a dog can't be hurt; it just decides loving you matters more.
Bonus: people hold grudges for years. A dog won't even hold one for three seconds. That's probably why it's happier than us.

items.sourceNote: 經典名言「想成為跟我家狗以為的我一樣好的人」的原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
在我家狗的眼裡，
我是全世界最厲害、最善良、最值得信任的人。

牠不知道我今天上班被罵，
不知道我有多少事沒做完，
不知道我其實沒那麼好。

但牠看我的眼神太認真了，
認真到我真的會想，
努力變成牠以為的那個我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「在外面撐得很累，回家被狗一看就軟掉」的朋友
variations: 精簡版：我這輩子的目標，就是努力活成我家狗以為的那個我。
延伸版：狗從不要求你完美，牠只是默默相信你很好——然後你就真的想變好了。

en.content:
In my dog's eyes,
I'm the smartest, kindest, most trustworthy person alive.

It has no idea I got chewed out at work today,
no idea how much I left unfinished,
no idea I'm not actually that great.

But it looks at me so seriously,
so completely sure,
that I genuinely want to become the person it thinks I am.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who holds it together all day, then melts the second their dog looks at them
variations: Short version: my life goal is to become the person my dog already thinks I am.
Bonus: a dog never asks you to be perfect. It just quietly believes you're good — and then you actually want to be.

items.sourceNote: 養狗後生活被狗接管的幽默觀察，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
養狗之後我的人生有了三大改變：

包包裡永遠有一支除毛滾輪，
相簿裡九成五是同一隻狗的不同角度，
還有所有計畫的第一句都是「那狗怎麼辦」。

我以為我養了一隻狗，
結果是牠承包了我整個生活。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「出門前先安排好狗、才輪到安排自己」的鏟屎官
variations: 精簡版：我以為我在養狗，後來發現是牠在經營我。
延伸版：朋友約我，我第一個反應不是看行事曆，是看狗——這大概就是當鏟屎官的覺悟。

en.content:
Three things changed in my life after I got a dog:

there's now a lint roller in every bag I own,
ninety-five percent of my camera roll is the same dog from different angles,
and every plan I make starts with "but what about the dog."

I thought I adopted a dog.
Turns out it took over the entire operation.
en.editorNote: Send to the dog parent who sorts out the dog first and themselves second
variations: Short version: I thought I was raising a dog. Turns out it's running me.
Bonus: when someone invites me out, my first instinct isn't to check my calendar — it's to check on the dog. That's the whole job.

items.sourceNote: Roger Caras「狗把全部都給了我們」名言的原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗把牠的全部都給了你。

你是牠世界的正中央，
是牠所有信任、所有期待的方向。

而牠要的，不過是你回家時的一句「我回來了」，
和你願意分牠的那一小口。

仔細想想，
這大概是人類這輩子做過最划算的一筆交易。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛接狗回家、還在被那份毫無保留的信任震到的新手家長
variations: 精簡版：牠把整個世界都壓在你身上，你只要記得回家就好。
延伸版：我們常覺得是我們在照顧狗，其實是牠用一輩子，把最好的部分都留給了我們。

en.content:
A dog gives you everything it has.

You are the dead center of its world,
the direction of all its trust and all its hope.

And all it asks in return
is an "I'm home" when you walk in,
and whatever small bite you're willing to share.

When you really think about it,
it might be the best deal a human ever made.
en.editorNote: Send to the new owner still reeling from how completely a dog trusts them
variations: Short version: it bets its whole world on you. All you have to do is come home.
Bonus: we like to think we take care of the dog. Really, it spends its whole life saving the best part for us.

items.sourceNote: 狗看到主人吃東西的經典反應，幽默原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
我吃飯的時候，
牠就坐在腳邊，眼睛瞪得圓圓的，
口水都快滴到地板了。

那眼神彷彿在說：
「我已經三天沒吃東西了。」

你十分鐘前才吃飽，碗還在那邊。

狗最擅長的演技，
就是讓你以為自己是個鐵石心腸的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「明明餵飽了，還是被狗的眼神搞到有罪惡感」的朋友
variations: 精簡版：狗看你吃飯的眼神，能讓你懷疑自己是不是虐待牠。
延伸版：牠不是真的餓，牠只是想參與你的人生——順便分一口。

en.content:
Every time I eat,
it sits by my feet, eyes wide as saucers,
drool about to hit the floor.

That look says:
"I haven't eaten in three days."

You fed it ten minutes ago. The bowl is right there.

A dog's finest acting skill
is making you feel like a cold-hearted monster.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who feels guilty mid-meal even though the dog is fully fed
variations: Short version: a dog's dinner-time stare can make you question whether you're secretly cruel.
Bonus: it's not really hungry. It just wants in on your life — and one bite, while it's at it.

items.sourceNote: 養狗後家裡全是狗毛的幽默自嘲，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
養狗之後我才懂，
狗毛不是髒，是一種風格。

黑褲子配白毛、白衣服配黑毛，
出門前再怎麼黏，車上、辦公室椅子上，
總有牠的一根毛先幫我報到。

我已經放棄抵抗了——
現在只當作：我走到哪，都帶著牠。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種出門前黏完毛、結果一坐下又是滿身狗毛的朋友
variations: 精簡版：狗毛不是問題，是我沒選擇但完全接受的時尚配件。
延伸版：以前看到衣服上的狗毛會抓狂，現在反而覺得安心——代表家裡有個一直在等我的傢伙。

en.content:
After getting a dog, I finally understood:
dog hair isn't mess, it's a style.

Black pants get white fur, white shirts get black fur.
No matter how much I lint-roll before leaving,
there's always one strand of it checking in ahead of me
on the car seat, on the office chair.

I've stopped fighting it —
now I just think of it as: wherever I go, I bring a little of the dog along.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who lint-rolls every morning and is covered in fur again the second they sit down
variations: Short version: dog hair isn't a problem. It's a fashion accessory I didn't choose but fully accept.
Bonus: I used to lose it over fur on my clothes. Now it's oddly comforting — proof there's someone home waiting for me.

items.sourceNote: 主人睡覺被狗佔床的經典處境，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
感情狀態：
睡得歪七扭八，只為了不吵到狗。

床是我買的、棉被是我洗的，
但實際上我只是租了角落那一小塊。

半夜想翻身，先看牠醒不醒；
牠一伸懶腰，我就自動往邊邊縮。

我不是主人，我是房客。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種半張床被狗佔走、自己縮在邊邊還不敢動的朋友
variations: 精簡版：床是我的，但我只是睡在牠願意分我的那一角。
延伸版：別人問我睡得好不好，我都說還行——畢竟有一隻狗願意讓我睡在牠旁邊，已經很給面子了。

en.content:
Relationship status:
sleeping all twisted up so I don't disturb the dog.

I bought the bed, I wash the sheets,
but in practice I just rent the small corner.

Want to roll over at 2am? First check if it's awake.
The second it stretches, I automatically shrink to the edge.

I'm not the owner. I'm the tenant.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend curled on the edge of their own bed, afraid to move because the dog looks comfortable
variations: Short version: it's my bed, but I sleep in whatever corner the dog is willing to share.
Bonus: people ask if I slept well. I say sure — a dog let me sleep next to it, that's already generous.

items.sourceNote: 狗的信任全然交付給主人，溫暖語錄原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗給你的信任，是一種「全部」。

牠不會留一手、不會先觀望，
你伸手牠就靠過來，
你說走牠就跟，連方向都不問。

人類花了一輩子學著保護自己，
而牠選擇把整顆心，毫無防備地交給你。

別辜負那份信任，
那是這世上最乾淨的東西之一。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛養狗、還在驚訝「牠怎麼可以這麼相信我」的朋友
variations: 精簡版：狗的信任是全部，沒有保留——這種乾淨，值得被好好對待。
延伸版：我們對人總是留三分，牠卻把整顆心攤開給你看。能被這樣相信，是一種福氣。

en.content:
The trust a dog gives you is total.

It doesn't hold anything back, doesn't wait to see how things go.
You reach out, it leans in.
You say let's go, it follows — without even asking which way.

Humans spend a lifetime learning to protect themselves,
and a dog just hands you its whole heart, completely undefended.

Don't betray that trust.
It's one of the purest things on this earth.
en.editorNote: Send to the new owner still stunned that a dog could trust them this completely
variations: Short version: a dog's trust is total, no part held back. That kind of pure deserves to be honored.
Bonus: we keep our guard up with people; a dog just lays its whole heart out for you. Being trusted like that is a gift.

items.sourceNote: 狗讓平凡日子變完整，溫暖語錄原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不是我生活的全部，
但牠讓我的生活變得完整。

下班回家，再累都有人衝過來迎接；
吃飯有人陪、發呆有人趴在腳邊、
難過的時候，牠什麼也不說，
只是把頭靠過來。

牠填補的不是時間，
是那些原本空著、自己也說不清楚的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「自從養了狗，回家才有家的感覺」的朋友
variations: 精簡版：狗不是生活的全部，卻把生活補成了完整的形狀。
延伸版：以前一個人住覺得很自由，現在才知道，原來那個房間一直缺了一隻會跑來蹭我的狗。

en.content:
A dog isn't my whole life,
but it makes my life whole.

Come home from work, exhausted, and someone still sprints over to greet you.
Someone to eat beside, someone curled at your feet while you zone out,
and when you're down, it says nothing at all —
it just rests its head against you.

What it fills isn't time,
it's all those empty spots you could never quite name.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who says home never felt like home until they got a dog
variations: Short version: a dog isn't my whole life, but it fills my life into a complete shape.
Bonus: living alone used to feel like freedom. Turns out the room was just missing a dog that runs over to lean on me.

items.sourceNote: 狗沒有週末概念、清晨叫主人起床的幽默，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我家的狗是我每天起床的動力。

真的，每天，非常早地，
起床。

牠不懂什麼叫週末、什麼叫補眠，
六點一到，鼻子就頂上來，
尾巴拍床的節奏比鬧鐘還準。

我以為養狗會讓我變懶，
結果牠把我訓練成全社區最早起的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「假日想睡晚一點，卻被狗準時叫醒」的朋友
variations: 精簡版：狗是我每天起床的動力——每天、非常早地、起床。
延伸版：別人的鬧鐘可以按貪睡，我家那隻不行，牠的貪睡鍵就是直接舔你的臉。

en.content:
My dog is the reason I get up every morning.

Really. Every. Single. Very. Early. morning.

It has no concept of weekends, no idea what sleeping in means.
The clock hits six and a cold nose lands on my face,
tail thumping the mattress more reliably than any alarm.

I thought a dog would make me lazier.
Instead it trained me into the earliest riser on the whole block.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who dreams of sleeping in on weekends but gets woken on schedule by a dog
variations: Short version: my dog is the reason I wake up every morning. Really, really early. Every single one.
Bonus: your alarm has a snooze button. Mine doesn't — its snooze button is licking your face.

items.sourceNote: 「我家狗沒被寵壞，是我被訓練好了」主題，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
別人說我把狗寵壞了。

才沒有，是牠把我訓練得很好而已。

牠盯著零食罐看三秒，我就開了。
牠在沙發上挪一下位置，我就自動去坐地板。
牠半夜換姿勢，我棉被都讓給牠。

到底是誰養誰，我已經分不清楚了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「嘴上嫌狗、實際上什麼都讓著狗」的朋友，他會默默承認
variations: 精簡版：我家狗沒被寵壞，是我這個主人被訓練得太好了。
延伸版：人家養狗是當主人，我養狗比較像在實習當管家，而且還沒領薪水。

en.content:
People say I've spoiled my dog.

I haven't. It's just trained me really well.

It stares at the treat jar for three seconds and I open it.
It shifts on the couch and I move to the floor on my own.
It rolls over at 2am and somehow I'm the one without a blanket.

At this point I genuinely can't tell who owns whom.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who complains about their dog but secretly gives it everything
variations: Short version: my dog isn't spoiled — I'm just very, very well trained.
Bonus: most people own a dog. I'm more like an unpaid intern auditioning to be its butler.

items.sourceNote: 「狗讓人生變完整」溫暖語錄主題，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不是你人生的全部，
但牠會把你的人生補成完整的一塊。

你忙、你累、你有時候忘了好好生活，
牠卻每天都把你當成牠的全世界。

所以再小的一隻，
也填得滿一個人最空的那塊位置。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合配毛孩照片發限動，或傳給剛養狗、覺得家裡突然不一樣的朋友
variations: 精簡版：狗不是人生的全部，卻能讓人生變完整。
延伸版：牠佔不了你太多時間，卻剛好填滿你心裡最空的那個角落。

en.content:
A dog isn't your whole life,
but it quietly makes your life whole.

You're busy, you're tired, some days you forget to actually live —
yet every single day, it treats you like its entire world.

So even the smallest one
can fill the emptiest corner a person has.
en.editorNote: Pairs well with a pet photo for a story post, or for a friend who just adopted and feels their home shift
variations: Short version: a dog isn't your whole life, but it makes your life whole.
Bonus: it barely takes up any of your time, yet it fills the one spot inside you that was always empty.

items.sourceNote: 「狗負責清地上掉的食物」幽默主題，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我有點同情沒養狗的人，
聽說他們東西掉到地上，還得自己彎腰撿。

我家不用。
薯條掉下去，零點五秒內現場清空。
連那聲「啪」我都還沒反應過來。

養狗之後，我家地板乾淨得不太正常。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給家裡有大型犬、或那種「吸塵器等級狗」的朋友，超有共鳴
variations: 精簡版：我同情沒養狗的人——東西掉地上居然要自己撿。
延伸版：我家不需要掃地機器人，我有一台會搖尾巴、還會挑食的活體版本。

en.content:
I feel a little sorry for people without a dog.

I hear when they drop food on the floor, they have to bend down and pick it up themselves.

Not in my house.
A fry hits the floor and it's gone in half a second.
I haven't even registered the sound yet.

Since getting a dog, my floor is suspiciously spotless.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone with a big dog or a certified 'vacuum-cleaner breed' — instant agreement
variations: Short version: I pity people without a dog — they actually have to pick up food they drop.
Bonus: I don't own a robot vacuum. I own a living one that wags its tail and is somehow still a picky eater.

items.sourceNote: 「狗愛你勝過愛自己」忠誠語錄主題，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
這世界上，
大概只有狗，
會愛你愛到勝過愛牠自己。

牠不會計較你今天臉色多臭、
手頭多緊、心情多糟，
你一進門，牠還是把整顆心交給你。

人類花一輩子學的「無條件」，
牠生下來就會了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在毛孩生日、或想到牠陪你走過低潮時，配照片發文
variations: 精簡版：世上唯一愛你勝過愛自己的，大概就是你的狗。
延伸版：你最難熬的那段日子，牠什麼都不懂，卻一直待在你腳邊沒走——這就是牠的答案。

en.content:
In this whole world,
probably only a dog
will love you more than it loves itself.

It doesn't care how sour your face is today,
how tight money is, how bad your mood gets —
the moment you walk in, it hands you its entire heart anyway.

The 'unconditional' that humans spend a lifetime trying to learn,
it was born already knowing.
en.editorNote: For a pet's birthday post, or when you remember how it stayed by you through a rough patch
variations: Short version: the only one who loves you more than it loves itself is probably your dog.
Bonus: through your hardest stretch it understood nothing, yet it never once left your feet — that was its answer.

items.sourceNote: 「狗有工會、會談判」幽默主題，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
有人說，狗有主人，貓有奴才。

我看我家這隻，比較像加入了工會。

散步時間沒到，免談。
零食份量不對，抗議。
你想叫牠下沙發？牠會看你一眼，意思是「再說一次試試」。

我以為我是飼主，
結果我比較像被牠面試上的員工。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給養柴犬、米克斯、或任何「很有意見」的狗主人，他立刻對號入座
variations: 精簡版：別人的狗有主人，我家的狗有工會。
延伸版：牠不只有工會，連年終、特休、和『不想理你日』都自己排好了。

en.content:
They say dogs have owners and cats have staff.

Looking at mine, I'd say it joined a union.

Walk time isn't here yet? Non-negotiable.
Treat portion looks off? Formal complaint filed.
Want it off the couch? It gives you a look that says 'say that again, I dare you.'

I thought I was the owner.
Turns out I'm just an employee it hired after an interview.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone with an opinionated dog — they'll recognize their own household instantly
variations: Short version: other people's dogs have owners. Mine has a union.
Bonus: it doesn't just have a union — it's already scheduled its bonuses, paid leave, and designated 'ignore-you' days.

items.sourceNote: 養狗後睡眠空間被佔據的日常幽默，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
養狗之前，我以為床是我的。

養狗之後我才發現，
床是牠的，我只是租了一個角落。

而且租約還不平等——
牠睡正中央攤成大字，
我縮在邊緣，半夜不敢翻身，
深怕吵醒這位真正的房東。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天被狗擠到床邊、卻甘願認份的狗主人，他會笑著傳給另一半
variations: 精簡版：床不是我的，我只是付房貸、然後睡角落的那個人。
延伸版：我後來想通了——這不是我的床，是牠的床，我只是負責付錢、鋪好、再被趕到邊邊的管理員。

en.content:
Before I got a dog, I thought the bed was mine.

After I got a dog, I learned the truth:
the bed is theirs. I'm just renting one corner of it.

And it's not even a fair lease —
they sprawl across the middle like a starfish,
while I cling to the edge, afraid to roll over at 3 a.m.
in case I wake the actual landlord.
en.editorNote: Send to any dog owner who gets shoved to the edge every night and somehow accepts it — they'll forward it to their partner
variations: Short version: it's not my bed. I'm just the one who pays the mortgage and sleeps in the corner.
Bonus: I've made peace with it — it's not my bed, it's the dog's bed, and I'm the manager who pays for it, makes it, and gets evicted to the edge nightly.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗不評判主人的療癒概念，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗看著你的時候，
牠不在想你是個什麼樣的人。

牠不管你今天搞砸了報告，
不管你帳戶剩多少，
不管你昨天說過要早睡結果又熬夜。

牠只知道一件事：
你回來了，而你是牠全世界最好的人。

有時候我們需要的，
就只是這樣一雙不帶評分的眼睛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近被生活打擊、覺得自己不夠好的朋友，狗狗的視角剛好能接住他
variations: 精簡版：狗看你的眼神裡沒有評分，只有「你終於回來了」。
延伸版：人會記得你的失敗，狗只記得你是誰。這大概就是為什麼累的時候，我們最想抱的是牠。

en.content:
When your dog looks at you,
it isn't wondering what kind of person you are.

It doesn't care that you bombed the presentation,
doesn't care what's left in your bank account,
doesn't care that you swore you'd sleep early and stayed up again.

It knows exactly one thing:
you came home, and you're the best person in its entire world.

Sometimes all we need
is one pair of eyes that doesn't keep score.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been beating themselves up lately — the dog's-eye view catches them at the right moment
variations: Short version: there's no scoreboard in the way your dog looks at you — just 'you finally came home.'
Bonus: people remember your failures; a dog only remembers who you are. That's probably why, on the hard days, it's the one we reach for.

items.sourceNote: 狗主人取消社交因為狗把頭靠在腿上，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
「抱歉今天不能去了，我家狗剛把頭靠在我腿上。」

這個理由聽起來很扯，
但每個養狗的人都懂——
狗的一顆頭壓在你腿上，
在法律上等同於不可抗力。

你不能動，不能起來，
更不能背叛那雙抬頭看你的眼睛。

聚會再約，腿先借牠枕一下。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合臨時取消約會時傳給朋友當藉口，養狗的朋友只會回「懂，去吧」
variations: 精簡版：狗把頭靠上來那一刻，我的行程就全部取消了。
延伸版：我本來要出門的，但牠用下巴鎖定了我的膝蓋。法庭上這叫『情有可原』，我家叫『今天不出門了』。

en.content:
"Sorry, I can't make it tonight — my dog just put its head on my lap."

It sounds like a ridiculous excuse,
but every dog owner gets it —
a single dog head resting on your leg
is legally equivalent to an act of God.

You can't move, you can't get up,
and you absolutely cannot betray those eyes looking up at you.

We'll reschedule. The leg's reserved for now.
en.editorNote: Perfect to send when you're bailing on plans — your dog-owner friends will just reply 'understood, go'
variations: Short version: the second the dog's head landed on my lap, every plan I had got canceled.
Bonus: I was about to head out, but it locked its chin onto my knee. In court they call it 'mitigating circumstances.' In my house we call it 'not leaving today.'

items.sourceNote: 狗陪伴主人走過低潮的療癒概念，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
牠不會說話，
所以牠永遠不會問你「你還好嗎」。

但你心情很差的那天，
牠會默默走過來，
把整個身體靠在你腳邊，
用一種「我哪裡都不去」的姿勢坐下。

有些安慰不需要語言，
只需要一個願意陪你坐在地板上的重量。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在低潮、不想多解釋的朋友，這段話替他說了那句說不出口的謝謝
variations: 精簡版：牠不會問我怎麼了，牠只是靠過來，然後決定不走了。
延伸版：人類安慰你要先問三個問題，狗只做一件事——把自己變成你身邊最溫暖的那塊重量。

en.content:
It can't talk,
so it will never ask you 'are you okay?'

But on the days you're falling apart,
it quietly walks over,
leans its whole body against your feet,
and sits down in a way that says 'I'm not going anywhere.'

Some comfort doesn't need words —
just a warm weight willing to sit on the floor with you.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend in a rough patch who doesn't want to explain — this says the thank-you they can't quite put into words
variations: Short version: it never asks what's wrong. It just leans in and decides it's staying.
Bonus: people ask three questions before they comfort you. A dog does one thing — it turns itself into the warmest weight in the room and parks right next to you.

items.sourceNote: 洗澡後狗狗覺得被背叛的經典畫面，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
平常牠看你的眼神，是全世界最深的愛。

直到你打開浴室的水龍頭。

那一秒，牠的眼神瞬間切換成：
「我這輩子最信任的人，原來是個叛徒。」

洗完澡牠會故意不理你三分鐘，
用全身濕答答的怨念，提醒你欠牠一輩子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次幫狗洗澡都被嫌棄的飼主，他一定秒懂那個被當叛徒的眼神
variations: 精簡版：幫牠洗澡那一刻，我從牠最愛的人變成頭號通緝犯。
延伸版：洗完澡牠甩了我一身水，然後背對著我坐下——那是一隻狗能做出最大的抗議。

en.content:
Every other day, the way your dog looks at you is the purest love on earth.

Until you turn on the bathroom faucet.

In that one second, its expression flips to:
'The person I trusted most in this life... is a traitor.'

After the bath it ignores you on purpose for three whole minutes,
radiating soggy resentment to remind you that you owe it forever.
en.editorNote: Send to any owner who gets the silent treatment after bath day — they know that betrayed look by heart
variations: Short version: the moment I started the bath, I went from its favorite person to its most wanted criminal.
Bonus: after the bath it shook water all over me, then sat with its back turned — the biggest protest a dog can stage.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗清晨叫主人起床的經典戲碼，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
世界上最準時的鬧鐘，
是一隻肚子餓的狗。

牠不需要充電，不會壞，
也沒有「再睡五分鐘」這個按鈕。

早上六點，牠會用濕鼻子頂你的臉，
用一隻狗的全部誠意告訴你：
「太陽出來了，而你的人生，該起床餵我了。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給被狗叫起床、永遠睡不到自然醒的飼主，他一定笑著認命
variations: 精簡版：我家不用買鬧鐘，我家養了一隻會肚子餓的鬧鐘。
延伸版：牠不懂什麼叫週末，在牠的字典裡，每天早上六點都是開飯時間。

en.content:
The most punctual alarm clock in the world
is a hungry dog.

It never needs charging, it never breaks,
and it has no 'snooze for five more minutes' button.

At six a.m. it presses a wet nose to your face
and, with the full sincerity of one dog, informs you:
'The sun is up, and your life is now scheduled around feeding me.'
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who hasn't slept past dawn since they got a dog — they'll laugh and accept their fate
variations: Short version: I never bought an alarm clock. I adopted one that gets hungry.
Bonus: it doesn't understand weekends. In its dictionary, six a.m. is breakfast time, every single day.

items.sourceNote: 狗對主人無條件的愛與不記仇，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
你今天遲到、被罵、把事情搞砸，
回到家，覺得自己一無是處。

但牠不知道這些。

在牠眼裡，你永遠是那個會回家的人，
是世界上最值得開心的事。

狗不會評分你的人生，
牠只確認一件事——你回來了，那就夠了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給今天過得很糟、覺得自己不夠好的朋友，提醒他有人永遠站在他這邊
variations: 精簡版：在牠眼裡，我不是失敗的大人，我只是那個終於回家的人。
延伸版：人類會記得你犯過的每個錯，狗只記得一件事——你是牠的人。

en.content:
You were late, you got chewed out, you messed things up,
and you walk in the door feeling like you're worth nothing.

But your dog doesn't know any of that.

In its eyes, you're still the one who comes home —
the single best thing that happens all day.

A dog never grades your life.
It only confirms one thing: you came back, and that's enough.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend having an awful day who feels like they're not enough — a reminder that someone is always on their side
variations: Short version: to my dog I'm not a failing adult — I'm just the person who finally came home.
Bonus: people remember every mistake you've made. A dog remembers one thing — that you're its person.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗偷食物的經典無辜表情，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
桌上少了半塊吐司，
地上有一條無辜到不行的狗。

你問：「是不是你？」

牠抬頭看你，眼神清澈，
尾巴乖乖貼地，
一臉「我完全不知道你在說什麼」的高貴姿態。

但牠嘴角那一點奶油，
出賣了牠整個犯罪現場。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給家裡有偷吃慣犯的飼主，他立刻想到自家那張裝無辜的臉
variations: 精簡版：證據確鑿，但牠的表情堅持自己是清白的。
延伸版：牠不會認罪，因為在牠的世界裡，放在牠搆得到的地方，就等於是給牠的。

en.content:
Half a slice of toast is missing from the table,
and there's one extremely innocent dog on the floor.

You ask: 'Was it you?'

It looks up, eyes crystal clear,
tail neatly tucked,
wearing the noble expression of someone who has 'no idea what you're talking about.'

But that little smear of butter on its lip
gives away the entire crime scene.
en.editorNote: Send to an owner with a repeat food thief at home — they'll picture that fake-innocent face instantly
variations: Short version: the evidence is overwhelming, but its face insists it's completely innocent.
Bonus: it will never confess, because in its world, anything left within reach was clearly meant for it.

items.sourceNote: 狗有主人、貓有員工的經典對比，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
有人說：狗有主人，貓有下屬。

但養了我家這隻之後我才發現——
牠既不是把我當主人，也不是把我當下屬。

牠把我當提款機、開罐器、暖暖包，
還有一個二十四小時待命、隨傳隨到的免費司機。

而我居然甘之如飴。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種嘴上喊著「誰才是主人」、行動上卻全面投降的飼主
variations: 精簡版：我以為我養了一隻狗，後來發現是牠養了一個我。
延伸版：牠不需要對我搖尾巴討好，因為牠很清楚，這個家真正的負責人是誰。

en.content:
People say: dogs have owners, cats have staff.

But after living with mine, I've realized
it doesn't see me as its owner, and it doesn't see me as its employee either.

It sees me as an ATM, a can opener, a heated blanket,
and a free chauffeur on call twenty-four hours a day.

And somehow I'm completely fine with this.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who keeps insisting they're 'in charge' while surrendering on every single front
variations: Short version: I thought I got a dog. Turns out the dog got a me.
Bonus: it never has to wag its tail to win me over — it already knows exactly who runs this house.

items.sourceNote: 狗是世上唯一愛你勝過愛自己的存在，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
這世界上很多愛，都是有條件的。

你要夠好、夠成功、夠值得，
別人才願意留在你身邊。

但你家那隻狗不是這樣。

你失業的那天，牠照樣窩在你腳邊；
你搞砸一切的那晚，牠還是把頭靠在你膝蓋上。

牠是這世上少數，愛你勝過愛自己的存在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近過得很辛苦、覺得自己不夠好的朋友——提醒他家裡那隻從沒這樣想過
variations: 精簡版：別人愛的是你的樣子，狗愛的是你這個人。
延伸版：你不必變得更好，牠才願意愛你。在牠眼裡，你早就已經是最好的了。

en.content:
So much love in this world comes with conditions.

You have to be good enough, successful enough, worthy enough,
before people decide to stay by your side.

But your dog isn't like that.

The day you lost your job, it still curled up at your feet.
The night you ruined everything, it still rested its head on your knee.

It's one of the few things on earth that loves you more than it loves itself.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend going through a hard time who feels like they're not enough — a reminder of how their dog already sees them
variations: Short version: people love the version of you that's doing well. A dog loves you.
Bonus: you don't have to become better for it to love you. In its eyes, you were always already the best.

items.sourceNote: 信狗顧家但別讓牠顧三明治，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
你可以放心把整個家交給狗顧。

陌生人靠近，牠會吠；
半夜有聲音，牠會起來巡邏；
你出門一整天，牠會守在門口等你。

但有一件事，你千萬不能交給牠——

你的三明治。

那個牠連零點五秒都守不住。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「狗很忠心，但食物不能放桌上」的飼主，他笑著點頭
variations: 精簡版：牠願意為你擋住全世界，唯獨擋不住你那盤雞排。
延伸版：論忠誠，牠滿分；論看守食物，牠是這個家最大的內賊。

en.content:
You can trust your dog to guard the entire house.

A stranger walks up, it barks.
There's a noise at midnight, it gets up to patrol.
You're out all day, it waits by the door for you.

But there's one thing you should never leave in its care —

your sandwich.

That, it can't guard for even half a second.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner whose dog is fiercely loyal but absolutely cannot be trusted near a plate of food
variations: Short version: it'll hold off the whole world for you, but not the fried chicken on your plate.
Bonus: loyalty, full marks. Guarding food, it's the biggest inside job in the house.

items.sourceNote: 外星人看人類遛狗撿便便誰是主人，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
想像一下，外星人第一次來到地球。

牠們看到：一個生物在前面悠閒地走，
後面跟著另一個生物，手裡拿著袋子，
專心地、彎腰撿起前者的排泄物。

外星人對望一眼，默默記下：

「拿袋子那個，應該是助理。」
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天乖乖牽繩、撿便便、還覺得自己是主人的飼主——他會會心一笑
variations: 精簡版：到底誰在遛誰，這個問題我每天散步時都會懷疑一次。
延伸版：牠在前面決定路線，我在後面負責善後，這分工怎麼看都不像我是老大。

en.content:
Picture aliens arriving on Earth for the very first time.

They see one creature strolling casually up front,
followed by another creature holding a bag,
bending down and carefully picking up the first one's waste.

The aliens glance at each other and quietly note:

'The one with the bag — that must be the assistant.'
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who dutifully holds the leash, picks up the poop, and still thinks they're the boss
variations: Short version: who's really walking whom? I question this once a day, every walk.
Bonus: it picks the route up front, I handle cleanup in the back — no version of this makes me look like the one in charge.

items.sourceNote: 狗讓我們的生活變得完整，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不是你生活的全部。

你有工作、有朋友、有一堆煩惱，
牠只是其中一小塊。

但奇怪的是——

是那一小塊，把你原本零零散散的日子，
安安靜靜地拼成了完整的一塊。

少了牠，整張圖就缺了一角。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「不算養狗狂，但這輩子再也離不開狗」的人
variations: 精簡版：牠不是我的全世界，但牠讓我的世界終於完整了。
延伸版：牠占的位置不大，卻剛好補上了那個你一直說不上來、卻始終空著的地方。

en.content:
A dog isn't your whole life.

You've got work, friends, a pile of worries —
it's just one small piece of all that.

But here's the strange part:

it's that one small piece that quietly takes your scattered days
and makes them whole.

Without it, the whole picture is missing a corner.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who wouldn't call themselves a crazy dog person, but knows they'll never live without a dog again
variations: Short version: it isn't my whole world, but it's what finally made my world whole.
Bonus: it doesn't take up much space, but it fills the exact spot you could never name and that was always empty.

items.sourceNote: 狗教人無條件的愛，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
人會記仇，會比較，會等你先道歉。

狗不會。

你今天罵了牠、忘了餵點心、出門整整十二個小時，
回家那一刻，牠還是用全世界最大的力氣愛你，
好像什麼都沒發生過。

養狗最謙卑的一件事，就是發現自己根本配不上這種愛，
卻每天還是被它包圍著。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近覺得人際關係很累的人——提醒他世界上還有一種愛不需要算來算去
variations: 精簡版：狗不記仇，不比較，不等你先低頭。牠只是看到你，就把所有的不開心忘光。
延伸版：人類花一輩子學「無條件的愛」這四個字，狗一出生就會了，而且每天都在示範給你看。

en.content:
People hold grudges. They keep score. They wait for you to apologize first.

Dogs don't.

You snapped at it today, forgot the treat, were gone for twelve straight hours —
and the second you walk through the door, it loves you with everything it's got,
like none of that ever happened.

The most humbling part of owning a dog is realizing you don't deserve a love like this,
yet you get wrapped in it every single day.
en.editorNote: Send to someone worn out by people lately — a reminder that one kind of love keeps no scorecard
variations: Short version: a dog holds no grudge, keeps no score, and never waits for you to cave first. It just sees you and forgets every bad thing.
Bonus: people spend a lifetime trying to learn unconditional love. Dogs are born fluent in it, and they demonstrate it for you daily.

items.sourceNote: 彩虹橋告別主題，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗進入我們的生命，是來教我們什麼叫愛。

牠們離開的時候，是來教我們什麼叫想念。

沒有任何一隻新的狗能取代舊的那隻——

牠只是讓你的心，又長大了一塊，
好把另一個名字，也永遠放進去。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近送走毛孩的朋友——不用多說什麼，這段話會替你陪著他
variations: 精簡版：牠來教我愛，牠走教我想念。心沒有變小，只是又多空出一個位子。
延伸版：你不會忘記前一隻，你只是學會了——愛從來不是替換，而是一層一層往上疊。

en.content:
A dog comes into our life to teach us what love is.

When it leaves, it teaches us what it means to miss someone.

No new dog ever replaces the old one —

it simply makes your heart grow one size larger,
so another name can live there forever, too.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just lost their dog — you don't need words, this will sit with them for you
variations: Short version: it came to teach me love, it left to teach me longing. My heart didn't shrink — it just made another room.
Bonus: you never forget the one before. You just learn that love was never a replacement — it only ever stacks, layer on layer.

items.sourceNote: 養狗日常吐槽，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
養狗之前，我以為我會是那個訓練牠的人。

結果現在：

牠一站到門口，我就自動拿牽繩。
牠一盯著我的盤子，我就自動分一塊。
牠往沙發我的位子一躺，我就自動坐去旁邊。

到底是誰養誰，我已經不敢深究了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「嘴上說狗最聽話、其實全家都聽狗的」朋友
variations: 精簡版：養狗前我以為我是主人，養狗後我發現我是助理。
延伸版：牠不需要學任何指令，因為牠早就把我訓練得很好了。

en.content:
Before I got a dog, I assumed I'd be the one doing the training.

Fast forward to now:

it walks to the door, and I automatically grab the leash.
it stares at my plate, and I automatically hand over a piece.
it flops onto my spot on the couch, and I automatically move over.

Who's training who? At this point I'm too afraid to ask.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who swears their dog is so obedient — while the whole household quietly obeys the dog
variations: Short version: before the dog, I thought I was the owner. After the dog, I realized I'm the assistant.
Bonus: it never had to learn a single command — it had me fully trained ages ago.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗活在當下的智慧，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不會煩惱明天。

牠不擔心房租，不糾結那句話該不該回，
也不會半夜醒來反省三年前說錯的話。

牠只知道：現在有陽光，有你，有一顆球。
那就是完整的一天。

有時候我真的覺得，
是牠在過日子，而我只是在撐日子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近被焦慮追著跑的人——提醒他，把日子過小一點，反而會大一點
variations: 精簡版：狗不煩惱明天，只認真活今天。光這一點，牠就比我活得通透。
延伸版：牠教我的不是怎麼變厲害，而是怎麼在一個普通的下午，覺得自己已經夠了。

en.content:
A dog doesn't worry about tomorrow.

It doesn't fret about rent, doesn't agonize over whether to reply to that text,
doesn't wake at 3 a.m. replaying something it said wrong three years ago.

It only knows this: right now there's sunshine, there's you, there's a ball.
That's a complete day.

Sometimes I honestly think
it's the one living, and I'm just the one getting by.
en.editorNote: Send to someone being chased by anxiety lately — a nudge that shrinking your day can somehow make it bigger
variations: Short version: a dog never worries about tomorrow, it just fully lives today. On that one thing alone, it's wiser than me.
Bonus: it didn't teach me how to be impressive — it taught me how to sit in an ordinary afternoon and feel like that's already enough.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗食物執念的幽默語錄，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我家狗的記性很奇怪。

你叫牠的名字，叫三次牠才勉強看你一眼。

但你只是在廚房，把零食櫃的門開了一公分，
沒有聲音，沒有喊牠，
牠卻已經坐在你腳邊，眼神發亮，尾巴掃地。

選擇性失憶，選擇性超能力。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「叫名字都不理、開零食袋秒到」的狗主人——他會笑著說這就是我家那隻
variations: 精簡版：叫名字裝沒聽到，開零食袋裝聲納。我家狗的耳朵是看心情運作的。
延伸版：牠記不得自己的名字，但記得家裡每一包零食放在哪、什麼時候會被打開。

en.content:
My dog's memory is a strange thing.

Call its name three times and you might get one reluctant glance.

But just open the treat cabinet one centimeter — no sound, no calling its name —
and it's already sitting at your feet, eyes glowing, tail sweeping the floor.

Selective amnesia, selective superpower.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner whose dog ignores its own name but teleports the second a bag crinkles — instant recognition
variations: Short version: deaf to its name, sonar-precise for a treat bag. My dog's ears run on mood.
Bonus: it can't remember its own name, but it knows exactly where every snack lives and when the cabinet opens.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗無條件的愛，Roger Caras 風格原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不會因為你今天賺多少而多愛你一點，
也不會因為你搞砸了什麼而少愛你一點。

你回家臉很臭，牠照樣黏過來。
你被全世界誤會，牠照樣相信你是好人。

在牠的世界裡，你不是你的成績、你的存款、你的頭銜，
你就是那個會回家的人。
那樣就夠了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近覺得自己「不夠好」的人——提醒他，有一種愛從來不看條件
variations: 精簡版：狗愛你，不是因為你做對了什麼，只是因為你是你。
延伸版：人會根據你的表現決定要不要愛你，狗不會。牠只記得你是會回家的那個人。

en.content:
A dog doesn't love you more on the day you earn more,
and it doesn't love you less on the day you screw something up.

You come home with a face like a storm — it leans in anyway.
The whole world misreads you — it still believes you're good.

In its world you're not your grades, your savings, or your title.
You're just the person who comes home.
And that's enough.
en.editorNote: Send to someone feeling 'not good enough' lately — a reminder that one kind of love never checks the conditions
variations: Short version: a dog doesn't love you for what you got right. It loves you for being you.
Bonus: people decide whether to love you based on your performance. A dog doesn't. It just remembers you're the one who comes home.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗佔據床位的日常幽默，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
買了一張雙人床，本來想說空間很夠。

結果現在：

狗睡正中央，呈大字形，佔走三分之二。
我縮在床邊三十公分，半夜一翻身就會掉下去。

我試著推牠，牠用一聲重重的嘆氣抗議。
我試著抱牠靠邊，牠變成一袋液體，怎麼搬都會流回中間。

所以這到底是我的床，還是我有幸獲准同睡的床？
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種「跟狗一起睡、結果自己被擠到床邊」的狗主人——他半夜的痛他懂
variations: 精簡版：我以為我買了張雙人床，其實我買了張狗床，附贈一個睡邊邊的我。
延伸版：牠睡覺會慢慢旋轉，像時鐘的指針，最後一定指向把我推下床的角度。

en.content:
I bought a queen-size bed, figured there'd be plenty of room.

Reality now:

the dog sleeps dead center, fully starfished, claiming two-thirds.
I'm clinging to a thirty-centimeter strip on the edge, one roll away from the floor.

I try to nudge it over — it protests with one heavy sigh.
I try to scoop it to the side — it turns into a bag of liquid and flows right back to the middle.

So is this my bed, or a bed I've been graciously permitted to share?
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who co-sleeps with their dog and wakes up hanging off the mattress — they know the 3 a.m. struggle
variations: Short version: I thought I bought a queen bed. Turns out I bought a dog bed, edge-sleeping human included.
Bonus: it rotates slowly in its sleep, like a clock hand, always landing on the angle that pushes me off.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗陪伴與安靜的愛，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
愛不一定要很大聲。

有時候，它只是一隻狗，
在你坐在地板發呆的時候，
默默走過來，把頭靠在你的膝蓋上。

牠不問你怎麼了，
不急著要你振作，
也不會說「想開一點」。

牠只是用整個身體告訴你：
沒關係，我在，我們一起待著就好。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近心情低落、不想說話的朋友——這段話比一百句加油更貼心
variations: 精簡版：最溫柔的安慰，是一隻狗安靜把頭靠在你膝蓋上，什麼都不問。
延伸版：牠不懂你發生什麼事，但牠懂你需要有人在。於是牠就在。

en.content:
Love doesn't have to be loud.

Sometimes it's just a dog,
walking over while you sit on the floor staring at nothing,
and resting its head on your knee.

It doesn't ask what's wrong,
doesn't rush you to pull it together,
doesn't tell you to look on the bright side.

It just tells you, with its whole body:
it's okay, I'm here, let's just stay like this.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been low and doesn't feel like talking — gentler than a hundred 'you got this' messages
variations: Short version: the softest comfort is a dog quietly resting its head on your knee, asking nothing.
Bonus: it doesn't understand what happened to you, but it understands you need someone there. So it's there.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗無辜臉與闖禍日常，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
養狗的日常公式：

某個東西被啃爛、某個東西被撞倒，
而現場唯一的嫌疑犯，
正用全世界最無辜的眼神看著你。

你明知道是牠，
但牠那張臉就是有辦法讓你說不出一句重話。

這就是狗——闖了禍，還能讓你先道歉。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給家裡有「拆家大師」的狗主人——那張無辜臉他每天都要面對一次
variations: 精簡版：牠咬爛了沙發，然後用無辜的眼神反問你：你怎麼可以懷疑我？
延伸版：證據確鑿、現場只有牠一隻，但你最後還是摸摸牠的頭說「沒事沒事」。

en.content:
The daily dog-owner formula:

something gets chewed up, something gets knocked over,
and the only suspect at the scene
is looking at you with the most innocent eyes on Earth.

You know it was the dog.
But that face has a way of making the harsh words die in your throat.

That's dogs for you — they cause the chaos and still get you to apologize first.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner of a certified couch-destroyer — they meet that innocent face daily
variations: Short version: it shredded the sofa, then looked up like, how dare you suspect me?
Bonus: the evidence is everywhere, it's the only one in the room, and yet you end up patting its head saying 'it's okay, it's okay.'

items.sourceNote: 狗狗社群貼文比人氣高，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我精心修圖三小時的旅遊照，按讚數 12。

我隨手拍的狗狗睡到流口水照，按讚數 387。

那一刻我終於認清現實：
在我的社群帳號裡，我只是牠的小編。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給整個相簿都是狗、自己反而沒幾張的飼主——他早就接受這個身分了
variations: 精簡版：我的帳號流量擔當是一隻狗，而我是免費工讀生。
延伸版：朋友追蹤我，其實是想看狗。我心知肚明，但我不介意，因為我也是。

en.content:
My vacation photo, edited for three careful hours: 12 likes.

The random shot of my dog drooling in its sleep: 387 likes.

That was the moment I accepted the truth:
on my own account, I'm just the dog's social media manager.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner whose camera roll is 90% dog — they made peace with this title long ago
variations: Short version: my account's main attraction is a dog, and I'm the unpaid intern.
Bonus: people follow me to see the dog. I know it. I don't mind — because so do I.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗讓生活完整，改寫自 Roger Caras 名句精神

zh-tw.content:
狗不是你生活的全部，

但牠讓你的生活變得完整。

少了牠，房子還是那個房子，
沙發、餐桌、玄關都在原位，
卻就是少了一個會在你開門時衝過來的理由。

原來「家」這個字，
有一部分是牠用尾巴搖出來的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛把狗接回家、或正在猶豫要不要養的朋友——這段話會幫他下定決心
variations: 精簡版：狗不是生活的全部，但少了牠，生活就缺了一角。
延伸版：房子是磚牆蓋的，家是那隻在門口等你的狗讓它成立的。

en.content:
A dog isn't your whole life,

but it makes your life whole.

Without it, the house is still the house —
the couch, the table, the entryway all in place,
but missing the one reason to come running when the door opens.

Turns out part of the word 'home'
is something a dog wagged into being.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just brought a dog home, or is still on the fence — this one helps them decide
variations: Short version: a dog isn't your whole life, but without one, life is missing a corner.
Bonus: walls make a house. The dog waiting by the door is what makes it a home.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗有員工待遇的玩笑，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
人家說，狗有主人，貓有奴才。

但我家這隻，比較像有工會。

散步時間到了——準時，不准遲到。
零食份量太少——當場抗議。
沙發要讓出黃金位置——免談。

我以為我是飼主，
結果我只是被牠錄取的長期飯票。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給被狗吃得死死的飼主——尤其家裡有柴犬、有意見的那種
variations: 精簡版：別人養狗是當主人，我養狗是去上班，而且老闆是牠。
延伸版：牠的福利清單包含三餐、零食、暖床、專屬沙發位，而我負責全部買單。

en.content:
They say dogs have masters and cats have staff.

But mine? Mine has a union.

Walk time arrives — punctual, no late starts allowed.
Snack portion too small — formal protest on the spot.
Give up the prime couch spot — non-negotiable.

I thought I was the owner.
Turns out I'm just the long-term meal ticket it hired.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who's completely run by their dog — especially the opinionated, Shiba-type kind
variations: Short version: other people own a dog. I clock in for one, and the boss has four legs.
Bonus: its benefits package includes three meals, snacks, a warm bed, and a reserved couch seat. I cover all of it.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗無條件的愛與接納，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不在乎你今天賺多少、穿什麼、車是不是名牌。

牠不會因為你失業就少愛你一點，
也不會因為你成功就突然更黏你。

在牠眼裡，你永遠是那個最好的人，
哪怕全世界都對你失望，
牠還是會把你當成牠的全世界。

這種愛，人類花一輩子學，狗一出生就會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近在懷疑自己、覺得不夠好的朋友——提醒他至少有一個生命，無條件地站在他這邊
variations: 精簡版：全世界都可以對你失望，但你的狗永遠不會。
延伸版：牠不懂履歷、不懂存款，牠只懂一件事——你回家了，這就夠了。

en.content:
A dog doesn't care how much you made today, what you're wearing, or whether your car has a badge.

It won't love you any less because you lost your job,
and it won't suddenly cling harder because you succeeded.

In its eyes you're always the best person there is —
even if the whole world is disappointed in you,
it still treats you like its entire world.

That kind of love takes humans a lifetime to learn. Dogs are born knowing it.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's doubting themselves and feeling not-good-enough — a reminder that at least one living thing is unconditionally on their side
variations: Short version: the whole world can be disappointed in you, but your dog never will be.
Bonus: it doesn't understand résumés or bank balances. It understands one thing — you came home, and that's enough.

items.sourceNote: 狗教會主人的人生課，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
養狗以後，我學會了幾件事：

門外有腳步聲，就是值得全力以赴的大事。
地上掉下來的東西，先吃再說。
生氣最多三分鐘，因為下一秒可能就要出門。
還有最重要的——不管今天多爛，看到喜歡的人回家，都要用盡全身的力氣開心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近過得很緊繃的朋友——狗活得比我們通透，偶爾該跟牠學一下
variations: 精簡版：狗教我最重要的一課——值得開心的事，就要用全身去開心。
延伸版：人類煩惱昨天和明天，狗只活在「現在門開了沒」。論誰過得比較快樂，答案其實很明顯。

en.content:
Since I got a dog, I've learned a few things:

Footsteps outside the door are always worth a full-body sprint.
If something hits the floor, eat first and ask questions later.
Stay mad for three minutes max, because we might be going for a walk.
And the big one — no matter how bad the day was, when your favorite person comes home, be happy with everything you've got.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been wound too tight lately — dogs live wiser than we do, and now and then it's worth taking notes
variations: Short version: the most important lesson my dog taught me — if something's worth being happy about, be happy with your whole body.
Bonus: humans worry about yesterday and tomorrow. Dogs only live in 'has the door opened yet.' On who's happier, the answer's pretty obvious.

items.sourceNote: 狗不在乎你的身分地位，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不在乎你有錢還是窮，
不在乎你書讀得多還是少，
不在乎你聰明還是反應慢半拍。

你把心交給牠，牠就把整顆心還給你。

這世界上，有幾個人能讓你這樣說？
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給在外面被人情冷暖磨累的朋友——提醒他家裡那位，從來不看條件
variations: 精簡版：狗從不看你的條件，牠只看你有沒有回家。
延伸版：人會因為你的身分決定要不要靠近，狗只會因為你是你，就決定愛你一輩子。

en.content:
A dog doesn't care if you're rich or broke,
doesn't care how many books you've read,
doesn't care if you're quick or a beat behind.

Give it your heart, and it hands you its whole one back.

How many people in this world can you say that about?
en.editorNote: Send to a friend worn down by the politics of who-likes-whom — a reminder that the one at home never checks your credentials
variations: Short version: a dog never checks your résumé. It only checks whether you came home.
Bonus: people decide whether to come close based on your status. A dog decides to love you for life based on one thing — that you're you.

items.sourceNote: 狗讓主人有罪惡感的吃飯名場面，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我家狗從來不會搶我的飯。

牠只是坐在你正前方，
用那種「我已經三天沒進食」的眼神盯著你，
每咬一口，牠的眼睛就跟著動一下，
喉嚨還配合地吞一下口水。

結果就是——飯還是我的，但我一口都吃不安心。
這不是搶，這是心理戰。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每次吃飯都被狗盯到投降的飼主——他會笑著說「這就是我家那隻」
variations: 精簡版：我家狗不搶飯，牠只負責讓我每一口都充滿罪惡感。
延伸版：牠不需要動手，光是那個眼神，就能讓一塊雞排嘗起來像偷來的。

en.content:
My dog never tries to steal my food.

It just sits directly in front of you,
staring with those 'I haven't eaten in three days' eyes,
eyes tracking every single bite,
throat swallowing in perfect sympathy.

The result — the food is still mine, but I can't enjoy a single bite.
That's not stealing. That's psychological warfare.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who surrenders half their plate every meal — they'll laugh and say 'that's literally my dog'
variations: Short version: my dog doesn't steal my food. It just makes sure every bite comes with guilt.
Bonus: it doesn't lift a paw. That one look alone makes a piece of fried chicken taste like it was stolen.

items.sourceNote: 狗是唯一愛你勝過愛自己的存在，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
這世界上大概只有一種生命，
會愛你愛到超過愛牠自己。

下雨天牠把乾的地方讓給你，
你難過時牠不問理由就靠過來，
你走到哪牠跟到哪，連你去廁所牠都覺得是生離死別。

人類花一輩子練習無私，
狗一出生就把這件事做到滿分。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給剛失去毛孩、或正被狗狗用力愛著的朋友——這種愛，值得被好好記住
variations: 精簡版：狗是這世界上唯一一種，愛你勝過愛自己的生命。
延伸版：你只是牠生命的一部分，牠卻把你當成牠的全部——這筆帳，我們大概一輩子都還不完。

en.content:
There's probably only one kind of creature on earth
that loves you more than it loves itself.

In the rain it gives you the dry spot.
When you're sad it leans in without asking why.
Wherever you go it follows, and even a bathroom trip feels to it like a tearful goodbye.

Humans spend a lifetime practicing selflessness.
Dogs are born scoring a perfect ten.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who just lost their pet, or one being fiercely loved by a dog right now — this kind of love deserves to be remembered
variations: Short version: a dog is the only thing on earth that loves you more than it loves itself.
Bonus: you're just one part of its life, but it treats you as its whole one — a debt we'll probably never finish paying back.

items.sourceNote: 洗澡後狗狗暴衝（zoomies）的養狗日常觀察，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
你花了半小時，把牠洗得香噴噴、毛蓬蓬，
滿心覺得：今天的狗，是頂級狀態。

結果牠一落地，
先甩了你一臉水，
再以時速六十公里衝過整間客廳，
最後在地毯上磨蹭打滾，
彷彿要把剛剛的香味全部退貨。

養狗才懂：
洗澡的乾淨，保鮮期大概三秒。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個剛幫狗洗完澡、下一秒就崩潰的飼主——你不孤單
variations: 精簡版：狗狗洗完澡的香味，保存期限是三秒，超過就要重洗。
延伸版：科學家至今無法解釋，為什麼狗洗完澡一定要暴衝。我的理論是：牠們在慶祝活著逃出浴室。

en.content:
You spent half an hour getting your dog squeaky clean, fluffy, smelling like a spa day.
You stand back thinking: peak dog. Top condition.

The second its paws hit the floor,
it shakes water all over your face,
blasts across the living room at sixty miles an hour,
and finishes by grinding itself into the rug,
as if returning that fresh scent for a full refund.

Only dog owners get it:
clean has a shelf life of about three seconds.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone who just bathed their dog and watched it all unravel one second later — you're not alone
variations: Short version: a freshly bathed dog stays clean for exactly three seconds, then it's back to square one.
Bonus: science still can't explain post-bath zoomies. My theory: they're celebrating that they survived the tub.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗吃飯時間死盯的養狗日常，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
你坐下來吃飯，
牠就坐在你正前方，
眼睛圓得發亮，口水慢慢累積，
偶爾發出一聲若有似無的嗚咽。

牠不吵、不搶，
只是用那種「我這輩子沒吃過任何東西」的眼神，
把你的每一口都看進靈魂裡。

養狗才懂：
世界上最有壓力的觀眾，不在劇場，
在你的餐桌旁邊。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個被狗狗用眼神勒索、最後還是分了一口的飼主
variations: 精簡版：吃飯時被狗狗死盯，那種壓力，比上台報告還大。
延伸版：牠不是在討食，牠是在提醒你——這個家裡，沒有任何一口是只屬於你的。

en.content:
You sit down to eat,
and there it is, parked right in front of you,
eyes huge and shining, drool slowly gathering,
letting out the occasional faint, tragic whimper.

It doesn't bark, doesn't snatch.
It just watches every single bite go in
with the eyes of a creature that has, apparently, never eaten in its entire life.

Only dog owners get it:
the most high-pressure audience on earth isn't in a theater —
it's sitting next to your dinner table.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone who's been guilt-stared into sharing a bite — every single time
variations: Short version: being stared at by your dog while you eat is more pressure than any work presentation.
Bonus: it's not begging — it's reminding you that in this house, not a single bite is truly only yours.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗喜歡在臭東西上打滾的養狗日常，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
散步的時候，
牠突然停在一塊你看不出是什麼的東西旁邊，
表情無比認真，
然後——整個身體幸福地倒下去，
在那團不明物上扭來扭去。

你大喊「不要！」的時候，
牠抬起頭，
臉上寫滿了純粹的、毫無悔意的快樂。

養狗才懂：
你心中的噁心，是牠心中的高級香水。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個在散步路上跟狗狗鬥智、最後還是輸的飼主
variations: 精簡版：對你來說最臭的東西，對狗來說是限量版香水。
延伸版：人類花大錢買香水想讓自己好聞一點，狗則努力打滾想讓自己聞起來像剛經歷一場冒險。我們真的不是同一種審美。

en.content:
On a walk,
it suddenly stops beside something you can't even identify,
wears the most serious expression,
and then — collapses its whole body in pure bliss,
wriggling around in the mystery substance.

The moment you yell "NO!"
it lifts its head
with a face full of pure, completely unrepentant joy.

Only dog owners get it:
what's revolting to you is premium cologne to your dog.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone who's out-strategized their dog on a walk and still lost
variations: Short version: the thing that smells worst to you is your dog's limited-edition fragrance.
Bonus: humans spend a fortune on perfume to smell nicer; dogs roll around to smell like they just survived an adventure. We are clearly not the same.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗教會我們活在當下的語錄，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不會為了昨天的事生悶氣，
也不會為了明天的事失眠。

牠只在乎一件事：
你，現在，在這裡。

門一開、你一回家，
對牠而言就是今天最好的事，
而且每一天都是。

我們努力學了好久的「活在當下」，
狗一出生，就已經是大師。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近一直被過去或未來綁架、忘了好好過今天的朋友
variations: 精簡版：狗不為昨天懊悔，也不為明天焦慮，牠只是好好地，跟你過今天。
延伸版：你回家那一刻，對牠來說永遠是大事——這就是狗教我們的：把每一次重逢，都當成第一次。

en.content:
A dog doesn't sulk over yesterday,
and it never lies awake worrying about tomorrow.

It cares about exactly one thing:
you, right now, here.

The door opens, you come home,
and to your dog that's the best thing that happened all day —
and somehow it's the best thing every single day.

We spend years trying to learn how to "live in the moment."
Dogs were born already masters of it.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's been hostage to the past or the future and forgot to just live today
variations: Short version: a dog doesn't regret yesterday or dread tomorrow — it just spends today fully with you.
Bonus: the moment you come home is always a big deal to your dog. That's the lesson: treat every reunion like it's the first one.

items.sourceNote: 每個人都覺得自己養到最好的狗，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
全世界的飼主都堅信一件事：
自己養到的，是最好的狗。

最神奇的是——
他們每一個人，都是對的。

因為「最好的狗」從來不是一個排名，
而是一種感覺：
那隻在你最低潮時靠過來、
在你回家時最開心、
把你當成全世界的狗，
當然，就是最好的那一隻。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每個一講到自家狗就眼睛發亮、停不下來的朋友——你說得對，牠就是最好的
variations: 精簡版：每個飼主都覺得自己養到最好的狗，而且他們全部都沒說錯。
延伸版：不是你家的狗剛好最好，是「被牠愛著」這件事，讓任何一隻狗，都成了最好的那一隻。

en.content:
Every dog owner on earth is certain of one thing:
they got the best dog.

The amazing part is —
every single one of them is right.

Because "the best dog" was never a ranking.
It's a feeling:
the one that leans into you at your lowest,
the one that's happiest when you come home,
the one that treats you like its whole world —
that one, of course, is the best.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend whose eyes light up and can't stop talking the second their dog comes up — you're right, yours is the best
variations: Short version: every owner thinks they got the best dog, and not one of them is wrong.
Bonus: it's not that your dog happens to be the best — it's that being loved by one makes any dog the best one there is.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗自封零食監督官的幽默梗，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我家狗沒有工作，
但牠堅持自己有一個正式職稱：

「零食總監」。

業務範圍包括：
冰箱一開就到場視察、
餅乾袋一響就立刻召開緊急會議、
以及任何時刻盯著你的嘴巴，確認你有沒有偷吃沒分牠的東西。

年薪零元，全年無休，
而且——從不請假。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那種一拆零食袋、狗就從三個房間外衝過來的飼主——他立刻認領這個職稱
variations: 精簡版：我家狗的正職是「零食監督官」，工時 24 小時，薪水是一片餅乾。
延伸版：牠不會幫你賺錢、不會做家事，但牠把「監督你吃東西」這份工作做得比誰都認真。

en.content:
My dog doesn't have a job,
but it insists it holds an official title:

"Director of Snacks."

The role includes:
showing up to inspect the moment the fridge opens,
calling an emergency meeting the second a chip bag crinkles,
and watching your mouth at all hours to confirm you didn't sneak a bite without sharing.

Salary: zero. Days off: none.
And it has never, not once, called in sick.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner whose dog sprints in from three rooms away the instant a snack bag opens — they'll claim this title immediately
variations: Short version: my dog's full-time job is 'Supervisor of Snacks' — 24-hour shifts, paid in one cracker.
Bonus: it won't earn you money or do a single chore, but it takes the job of supervising your eating more seriously than anyone alive.

items.sourceNote: 狗是唯一愛你勝過愛自己的生物，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
這世界上會有很多人愛你，
但他們多多少少，都還是先愛著自己。

只有一種生物例外——
牠寧可餓著，也要把最後一口分你；
牠寧可淋雨，也要擋在你前面；
牠這輩子最重要的事，就是你。

狗，大概是唯一一種
愛你勝過愛牠自己的存在。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合配狗狗依偎在主人身邊的照片，或在想念毛孩的日子傳給懂的人
variations: 精簡版：世界上會愛你的人很多，但會愛你勝過愛自己的，大概只有狗。
延伸版：牠不會說一句話，卻用整個生命告訴你——在牠心裡，你永遠排第一。

en.content:
Plenty of people in this world will love you,
but most of them, in the end, still love themselves a little first.

There's only one creature that's the exception —
it would go hungry to give you the last bite,
stand in the rain to keep it off you,
and spend its whole life with one priority: you.

A dog is probably the only living thing
that loves you more than it loves itself.
en.editorNote: Pairs well with a photo of a dog curled against its owner, or send it to someone missing a pet on a quiet day
variations: Short version: lots of people will love you, but the only one who loves you more than itself is probably your dog.
Bonus: it never says a word, yet its whole life tells you the same thing — in its heart, you always come first.

items.sourceNote: 狗不在乎你有沒有錢只在乎你的心，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗不在乎你帳戶裡有幾位數，
不在乎你開什麼車、住幾坪，
也不在乎你今天表現得聰明還是出糗。

牠唯一在意的，
是你願不願意把心交給牠。

你給牠一顆真心，
牠回你一整條命。

這大概是這世界上，
最划算、也最公平的交易。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給覺得自己在外面被各種條件衡量、回家只想被單純對待的人
variations: 精簡版：狗不問你有沒有錢、聰不聰明，只問你願不願意對牠好——你給一顆心，牠還你一輩子。
延伸版：在牠眼裡你不需要證明什麼，你只要回家，就已經是牠的全世界了。

en.content:
A dog doesn't care how many digits are in your bank account,
doesn't care what you drive or how big your place is,
doesn't care whether you looked smart today or made a fool of yourself.

The only thing it cares about
is whether you'll hand it your heart.

Give it one honest heart,
and it hands you its whole life back.

It might be the fairest, best-value
trade in the entire world.
en.editorNote: Send to someone who feels measured by their resume all day and just wants to be taken at face value when they get home
variations: Short version: a dog doesn't ask if you're rich or clever — only if you'll be kind. Give it a heart, it gives you a lifetime.
Bonus: in its eyes you don't have to prove a thing — just come home, and you're already its whole world.

items.sourceNote: 我家狗以為自己是人的幽默吐槽，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我家狗深信自己是人。

吃飯要坐你旁邊的位子，
看電視要佔最好的角度，
你講電話牠要在旁邊插嘴，
你睡覺牠要躺正中央——還嫌你佔太多。

我從來沒糾正過牠，
因為說真的，
牠把「人」當得，比我認真多了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給家裡那隻把自己當成家庭成員、而且地位還比你高的狗主人——他笑著點頭
variations: 精簡版：我家狗以為自己是人，而且老實說，牠當人當得比我成功。
延伸版：牠不知道自己是狗，我也懶得提醒——這個家有牠當「人」，已經夠熱鬧了。

en.content:
My dog is convinced it's a person.

It takes the seat next to you at dinner,
claims the best angle for the TV,
cuts into your phone calls with its own opinion,
and sleeps dead center of the bed — then acts like you're the one hogging it.

I've never corrected it,
because honestly,
it plays the role of 'person' more convincingly than I do.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner whose dog acts like a full family member and somehow outranks them — they'll nod and laugh
variations: Short version: my dog thinks it's a person, and frankly it's better at being one than I am.
Bonus: it has no idea it's a dog, and I'm not about to remind it — this house is plenty lively with it running things.

items.sourceNote: 外星人看人類遛狗撿便便的幽默梗，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
假設外星人飛過來，剛好看見：

一個人類，彎著腰，
用手把另一種生物的大便撿起來、裝進袋子，
再小心翼翼地拎著走完整條路。

那旁邊那隻搖著尾巴、抬頭挺胸的呢？
牠連回頭看一眼都沒有。

外星人會在報告上寫：
這顆星球，狗才是主人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天乖乖撿便便、卻還是被狗用眼神指揮的飼主——他會笑著認命
variations: 精簡版：你撿便便、提袋子、跟在後面，狗昂首闊步走在前面——到底誰才是被養的那個？
延伸版：下次撿的時候抬頭挺胸一點，至少在外星人眼裡，要輸也要輸得有尊嚴。

en.content:
Picture an alien flying past Earth, catching this exact scene:

a human, bent over,
scooping up another creature's poop with a bag,
then carrying it carefully for the rest of the walk.

And the one trotting ahead, tail high, chest out?
It doesn't even glance back.

The alien writes in its report:
on this planet, the dogs are clearly in charge.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who dutifully picks up after their dog yet still gets bossed around by a look — they'll laugh and accept their fate
variations: Short version: you scoop, you bag, you follow behind while the dog struts in front. Remind me who's the pet?
Bonus: next time, scoop with your chest out — if you're going to lose to the alien's report, at least lose with dignity.

items.sourceNote: 對狗可以講任何蠢話牠都覺得你很有道理，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
你可以對你家狗講任何蠢到不行的話：

「我覺得我老闆其實偷偷很欣賞我。」
「這次減肥一定會成功。」
「我等一下只吃一片洋芋片。」

牠都會抬起頭，眼神發亮地看著你，
那表情清清楚楚寫著：

「哇，你說得太對了，我怎麼沒想到。」

世界上最便宜、也最有效的心理諮商，
四隻腳，會掉毛。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給需要一個永遠站在自己這邊的聽眾的朋友——他懂那種被全心相信的感覺
variations: 精簡版：對狗講再蠢的話，牠都用「你真是天才」的眼神看你——這種無條件支持，去哪找？
延伸版：人類朋友會吐槽你，狗只會點頭。有時候你要的不是建議，是有人相信你。

en.content:
You can say the dumbest things to your dog:

"I think my boss secretly admires me."
"This diet is definitely going to work this time."
"I'm only going to eat one chip."

And it just looks up at you, eyes shining,
with an expression that clearly says:

"Wow, you're so right, why didn't I think of that."

The cheapest, most effective therapy in the world
has four legs and sheds.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who needs an audience that's always on their side — they know exactly how it feels to be believed
variations: Short version: say anything dumb to a dog and it looks at you like you're a genius. Where else do you get that kind of support?
Bonus: human friends fact-check you, dogs just nod along. Sometimes you don't need advice — you need someone who believes you.

items.sourceNote: 狗比自己更愛你（Josh Billings 名言精神），原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
這世界上，
大概只有狗，
會愛你愛得比愛自己還多。

牠把最好的位置讓給你，
把最後一口零食看著你吃完，
你難過的時候，
牠不會問為什麼，只是把頭靠過來。

我們常說要學會愛自己——
但有時候我覺得，
是狗在偷偷教我們，
怎麼好好愛一個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給最近有點累、覺得沒人懂自己的朋友——提醒他家裡那雙眼睛一直都懂
variations: 精簡版：狗是這世界上唯一愛你勝過愛自己的生物，這件事每天都在你家上演，只是你習慣了。
延伸版：牠不會說愛你，但牠用整個身體、整段一生在說。

en.content:
There's probably only one creature on earth
that loves you more than it loves itself,
and it's lying by your feet right now.

It gives you the best spot on the couch,
watches you finish the last bite of the treat,
and when you're sad,
it doesn't ask why — it just rests its head against you.

We're always told to learn to love ourselves —
but sometimes I think
it's the dog quietly teaching us
how to love someone well.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend who's worn out and feeling unseen — remind them the eyes at home have always understood
variations: Short version: a dog is the only thing on earth that loves you more than itself, and it proves it every single day — you've just stopped noticing.
Bonus: it never says it loves you, but it says it with its whole body, its whole life.

items.sourceNote: 狗用搖尾巴交朋友而不是搬弄是非，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
你有沒有發現，
狗永遠不缺朋友？

因為牠交朋友靠的是搖尾巴，
不是搬弄是非。

牠不會在背後說誰壞話，
不會記仇，不會已讀不回，
看到你開心，牠就跟著開心，
你回家，牠永遠當作天大的好消息。

當人當久了好累的時候，
看看狗，
牠把「真心」這件事，活得超級簡單。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給在複雜人際裡耗到累的朋友——提醒他真誠其實可以很簡單
variations: 精簡版：狗朋友多，是因為牠搖尾巴而不是嚼舌根——這道理人類好像越長大越忘記。
延伸版：不記仇、不冷戰、不已讀不回——狗早就活成了我們最想要的那種朋友。

en.content:
Ever notice how a dog is never short on friends?

That's because it makes them by wagging its tail,
not by wagging its tongue.

It doesn't talk behind anyone's back,
doesn't hold grudges, doesn't leave you on read.
When you're happy, it's happy,
and every time you come home it treats it like the best news on earth.

When being a person gets exhausting,
look at your dog —
it lives the whole 'being genuine' thing
so, so simply.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend drained by complicated relationships — a reminder that being genuine can actually be simple
variations: Short version: dogs have plenty of friends because they wag their tails, not their tongues — a lesson we seem to forget as we grow up.
Bonus: no grudges, no silent treatment, never leaves you on read — a dog already lives like the kind of friend we all wish we had.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗睡覺/懶散主題的原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我家狗一天可以睡十八個小時，
醒來的時候，還是一臉很累的樣子。

我努力工作、拼命充電、認真過生活，
結果最會休息、活得最爽的，
是那隻連飯都要人端到面前的傢伙。

有時候真的很想問牠：
你到底哪裡累了？
zh-tw.editorNote: 配一張狗狗四腳朝天大睡的照片發限動，保證朋友都會標記自家那隻
variations: 短版：這世界上最不缺睡眠、卻永遠喊累的，就是我家那隻狗。
延伸：牠把「耍廢」活成一種天賦——找個舒服的角落，把世界關機，這件事牠比誰都在行。

en.content:
My dog sleeps eighteen hours a day,
and somehow still wakes up looking exhausted.

I grind, I recharge, I try to live a productive life,
yet the one who rests best and clearly lives best
is the creature who won't even walk to its own food bowl.

Some days I just want to ask:
what, exactly, are you tired from?
en.editorNote: Pair with a photo of your dog passed out belly-up — every dog owner will tag their own
variations: Short version: nobody on earth sleeps more or complains of being tired less convincingly than my dog.
Bonus: dogs turned laziness into a superpower — find a cozy corner, log off from the world, and master the nap. They're better at it than any of us.

items.sourceNote: Dan Gemeinhart『狗會勇敢地活著』概念的原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
狗的一生很短，
短到我們常常還沒準備好，牠就先走了。

但牠們從來不浪費時間害怕明天。

牠們勇敢地活、盡情地愛，
守護著自己的家，
把每一個當下都過得閃閃發亮——
一直到最後一刻，都還在好好地活著。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合寫給正在陪伴老狗的朋友，或懷念離開毛孩的人；溫柔但不刻意煽情
variations: 延伸：牠教會我最重要的一課，不是怎麼面對離別，而是怎麼把還在一起的每一天，過成最好的一天。
短版：牠們活得很短，卻活得很滿——從不為明天焦慮，只為此刻用力去愛。

en.content:
A dog's life is short —
so short that it often leaves before we're ever ready.

But dogs never waste a single day being afraid of tomorrow.

They live brave, they love hard,
they guard the ones who are theirs,
and they make every ordinary moment shine —
right up until the very last one, they are busy living.
en.editorNote: For someone caring for a senior dog, or grieving one that's gone — gentle, not overwrought
variations: Bonus: the biggest lesson my dog taught me wasn't how to say goodbye — it was how to make every day we still have the best one.
Short version: their lives are short but never small. No fear of tomorrow, all in on right now.

items.sourceNote: 彩虹橋/毛孩留下的痕跡概念，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
牠走了以後，家還是那個家，
只是門口少了那雙等你回來的眼睛。

你還是會不小心留一口飯，
經過牠常睡的角落還是會放輕腳步。

毛孩不會真的離開，
牠只是換了一種方式，
住進你心裡那個永遠不會空的位置。
zh-tw.editorNote: 送給剛送走毛孩的朋友，不用多說什麼，這段話會替你把想講的話講完
variations: 延伸：牠在你心上留下的腳印，不會因為時間就淡掉——那是牠來過、也愛過你的證明。
短版：牠沒有離開，只是先到一個叫「想念」的地方，等你哪天再相遇。

en.content:
After it's gone, the house is still the house,
only the doorway is missing the eyes that waited for you.

You still catch yourself saving a last bite,
still soften your steps near the corner where it used to sleep.

A dog never really leaves.
It just changes form,
and moves into that spot in your heart that stays full forever.
en.editorNote: For a friend who just lost a dog — you don't need to add words; this says what you couldn't
variations: Bonus: the pawprints it left on your heart don't fade with time — they're proof it was here, and that it loved you.
Short version: it didn't leave. It just went ahead to a place called 'missing you,' and it's waiting there.

items.sourceNote: 『狗教我停下來休息』主題的原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
整個世界都在催你快一點、多一點、再撐一下，
只有你家的狗，堅持要你坐下來。

牠不懂什麼叫進度落後，
牠只知道太陽很暖、地板很涼、你的腿很適合當枕頭。

有時候最厲害的人生導師，
不是講很多大道理的那個，
而是那隻示範給你看「現在就躺下」的傢伙。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合加班到懷疑人生時發文，或提醒自己該休息的朋友
variations: 延伸：牠沒讀過任何一本時間管理的書，卻活得比我們任何人都懂得放過自己。
短版：全世界都要你再快一點，只有你家的狗要你坐下來——聽牠的。

en.content:
The whole world tells you to go faster, do more, push a little longer.
Your dog is the only one insisting you sit down.

It has no concept of falling behind.
It only knows the sun is warm, the floor is cool, and your lap makes an excellent pillow.

Sometimes the best life coach
isn't the one full of big advice —
it's the one demonstrating, in real time, how to just lie down right now.
en.editorNote: Perfect for posting during a burnout week, or for a friend who needs the reminder to rest
variations: Bonus: it never read a single book on time management, yet it lives kinder to itself than any of us manage to.
Short version: the whole world wants you to speed up. Your dog wants you to sit down. Listen to the dog.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗聽到零食袋聲音的反應，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
牠可以睡到叫名字都叫不醒，
耳朵像關機一樣。

但只要你在廚房輕輕捏一下零食袋，
那個「窸窣」的聲音，
牠三個房間外就衝過來，
連地板都來不及煞車。

所以我一直懷疑，
牠不是聽不到，
牠只是在篩選。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個「叫牠吃飯要喊十遍、開零食袋秒到」的狗主人
variations: 進階版：你只是想偷偷吃洋芋片，牠立刻出現在你腳邊，眼神寫著：分我一片，我什麼都沒看到。
短版：叫名字裝聾，零食袋秒醒——這隻狗的聽力，是有選擇性的。

en.content:
It can sleep so deeply that calling its name does nothing.
Ears completely offline.

But the second you gently squeeze a treat bag in the kitchen,
that tiny crinkle sound,
and it comes flying in from three rooms away,
sliding across the floor because it forgot to brake.

Which makes me suspect
it's not that it can't hear me.
It's just curating.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who calls their dog ten times for dinner but gets an instant response to a snack bag
variations: Bonus: you try to secretly eat some chips, and it materializes at your feet, eyes saying: share one, and I saw nothing.
Short version: deaf to its own name, wide awake for a treat bag. This dog's hearing is highly selective.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗盯著人吃飯的行為，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
你吃飯的時候，
牠不吵、不叫、不搶。

牠只是坐得直直的，
用一雙全世界最誠懇的眼睛看著你，
看著你的筷子，
看著食物進到你嘴裡，
再默默吞一口口水。

牠什麼都沒說，
但你已經有罪惡感了。

這就是狗——
牠不用開口，就能讓你自願分一半。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個吃飯永遠有一雙眼睛在旁邊注視的狗主人
variations: 進階版：你假裝沒看到，牠就把下巴輕輕靠在你大腿上，力道剛好——不吵你，只是提醒你牠還在。
短版：牠不搶你的食物，牠只是用眼神讓你良心不安到自己分牠。

en.content:
When you eat,
it doesn't bark, doesn't beg, doesn't grab.

It just sits up perfectly straight,
watching you with the most sincere eyes in the world,
watching your fork,
watching the food go into your mouth,
and quietly swallowing.

It says nothing,
but you already feel guilty.

That's a dog for you —
it doesn't need words to make you hand over half your plate.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who has never eaten a meal without a pair of eyes watching every bite
variations: Bonus: you pretend not to notice, so it rests its chin gently on your thigh — just enough pressure to remind you it's still there.
Short version: it never steals your food. It just stares until your conscience hands it over.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗雨天不肯出門散步，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
晴天的時候，
牠在門口等散步等到把你的鞋子都咬來了。

下雨的時候，
你拿牽繩站在門口，
牠看你一眼，
轉身走回沙發，
把自己捲成一顆不想溝通的球。

那個眼神很清楚：
「今天這種天氣，我建議我們都待在家。」

連狗都懂看天氣行事，
是不是該檢討的是我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個下雨天被狗用眼神拒絕散步的主人——他一定笑出來
variations: 進階版：你硬把牠帶出門，牠走三步就開始抬頭看你，那表情像在說：你看吧，我就說不要出來。
短版：晴天催你散步，雨天勸你在家——這隻狗比氣象主播還會看天氣。

en.content:
On a sunny day,
it waits by the door so eagerly it brings you your own shoes.

On a rainy day,
you stand at the door holding the leash,
it gives you one look,
turns around, walks back to the couch,
and curls into a ball that refuses further discussion.

The message is clear:
"In weather like this, I recommend we both stay home."

When even the dog reads the forecast better than you,
maybe you're the one who needs a rethink.
en.editorNote: Send to the owner who got rejected for a walk by their dog's eyes on a rainy day — they'll laugh
variations: Bonus: you drag it out anyway, and three steps in it keeps looking up at you, face saying: see? I told you we should've stayed in.
Short version: it begs for walks in sunshine and lobbies for the couch in rain. This dog reads the weather better than the forecast.

items.sourceNote: 狗狗感知主人情緒的陪伴時刻，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
你以為牠什麼都不懂，
可是你難過的那天，
牠不玩球、不討零食、不吵著出門。

牠只是慢慢走過來，
把整個身體靠在你腳邊，
重重地嘆一口氣，
好像在說：我不知道發生什麼事，
但我會陪你坐到你好一點為止。

人有時候要很多句話才安慰得了，
狗只需要靠過來就夠了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個「心情差的時候被狗默默陪著」的人——這是養狗最說不出口的溫柔
variations: 進階版：你哭的時候，牠會伸出一隻腳搭在你手上，不是要什麼，只是想讓你知道牠在。
短版：你難過的時候，牠什麼都不做，只是靠過來——有時候這樣就夠了。

en.content:
You think it understands nothing,
but on the day you're hurting,
it doesn't chase the ball, doesn't beg for treats, doesn't nag to go out.

It just walks over slowly,
leans its whole body against your leg,
lets out a heavy sigh,
as if to say: I don't know what happened,
but I'll sit here with you until you feel a little better.

Sometimes people need a hundred words to comfort you.
A dog just needs to lean in.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone who's been quietly kept company by their dog on a bad day — this is the tenderness dog owners can never quite put into words
variations: Bonus: when you cry, it rests one paw on your hand — not asking for anything, just letting you know it's there.
Short version: on your worst day it does nothing but lean in. Sometimes that's all it takes.

items.sourceNote: 外星人看人類遛狗撿便便的角色反差，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
如果外星人第一次來地球，
看到一個人牽著一隻狗散步，
狗大便，人蹲下來撿，
還小心翼翼打包收好——

你覺得外星人會以為，
誰才是這個星球的主人？
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給每天彎腰撿便便還撿得很認命的狗奴——這題他心裡早就有答案了
variations: 進階版：不只撿便便，你還要記得帶水、帶零食、隨時看牠臉色決定散步路線。到底誰在遛誰？
短版：狗大便你撿、狗想走你停——外星人看了應該會直接對狗敬禮。

en.content:
If aliens landed on Earth for the first time
and saw a person walking a dog,
the dog does its business,
and the human crouches down, picks it up,
and carefully bags it away —

who do you think the aliens would assume
is actually in charge of this planet?
en.editorNote: Send to the dog parent who bends down to bag it every single day without complaint — they already know the answer
variations: Bonus: you don't just bag the poop — you carry the water, the treats, and adjust the whole route based on its mood. So who's walking whom?
Short version: the dog goes, you scoop; the dog stops, you wait. The aliens would salute the dog.

items.sourceNote: 改寫自 Erica Jong 名句核心——狗擴展人心而非取代，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
狗來到你的生命裡，
是為了教你什麼叫毫無保留的愛。

牠離開的時候，
是為了教你什麼叫捨不得。

下一隻狗永遠不會取代上一隻，
牠只是把你心裡那個位置，
再撐得更大一點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給正在猶豫「送走一隻之後還敢不敢再養」的人——這段話會替他把心結解開
variations: 進階版：你以為心已經被上一隻填滿了，結果新的一隻來了，你才發現愛從來不是被瓜分，是一直被加大。
短版：牠們不是來替補的，是來把你的心撐得更大的。

en.content:
A dog comes into your life
to teach you what it means to love without holding back.

When it leaves,
it teaches you what it means to ache for something gone.

The next dog never replaces the last one.
It just takes the space in your heart
and stretches it a little wider.
en.editorNote: Send to anyone hesitating over whether they could ever love again after losing a dog — this untangles the knot for them
variations: Bonus: you think your heart was already full from the last one, then a new one shows up and you learn love was never divided — only expanded.
Short version: they don't come to replace. They come to make your heart bigger.

items.sourceNote: 改寫自 Dave Barry 名句核心——狗對主人的無條件認同，原創語錄

zh-tw.content:
你可以對狗說出全世界最蠢的話，
牠還是會抬起頭，眼睛發亮地看著你，
那個表情像在說：

「哇，你講得太對了，
我怎麼從來沒想到！」

這輩子會這樣無條件相信你的，
大概只剩牠一個了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個在外面被質疑一整天、回家只有狗全力挺他的人——他會會心一笑
variations: 進階版：你跟牠抱怨老闆有多離譜，牠一句都聽不懂，但牠會用力點兩下頭，讓你覺得自己完全是對的。
短版：全世界都可以懷疑你，只有你的狗永遠站你這邊。

en.content:
You can say the dumbest thing in the world to your dog,
